visualizerParams.title: Iterative Bitwise Addition
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The provided code uses recursion for bitwise addition. Refactor it to use an iterative `while` loop, which is often more memory-efficient in Python as it avoids creating new stack frames.

solution.explanation: The iterative version achieves the same result by repeatedly calculating the partial sum (XOR) and the carry (AND shifted left) until there are no more carries left. It is more robust for very large numbers that might exceed Python's recursion limit.
